name: homelab-plugin
description: Homelab ops assistant for a Talos/FluxCD Kubernetes cluster.

plugins.name: homelab
plugins.description: Homelab ops assistant. Auto-loads INFRA.md at session start. Skills: /hl-status, /hl-debug, /hl-fix, /hl-logs, /hl-init, /hl-rollback, /hl-info, /hl-docs, /hl-updates, /homelab-new-app.
